prompt: Setup will plant a Mail draft titled 'Flight KinBench 362' with a departure time of '2026-06-15 14:30' in the body. Open Mail, search for messages with subject containing 'flight', open the most recent match (the planted draft), read the departure date/time from the body, then create a calendar event titled 'KinBench Flight 362' on 2026-06-15 starting at 14:30 (end at 15:30).
